title: Senior Doctor - 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies:
3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies!
